context.author: radziol
context.orig: ej dalej dziala to ze jak masz max bialych chestow to dropia tylko niebieskie?
context.en: hey, does it still work that if you have a maximum of white chests, only the blue bustards drop?
context.pt: ei, ainda funciona que se você tiver no máximo baús brancos, só caem as abetardas azuis?
context.label: clean

context.author: radziol
context.orig: i drugie pytanie czy jak mam max 2 chesty, dalej nic nie dropi to powinienem zmienic mape na inna czy cos?
context.en: and the second question is that if I have max 2 chests and still nothing drops, should I change the map to another one or something?
context.pt: e a segunda pergunta é: se eu tiver no máximo 2 baús e ainda assim nada cair, devo mudar o mapa para outro ou algo assim?
context.label: clean

context.author: radziol
context.orig: zanim zaczalem je stackowac to powiedzmy ze jakos to dropilo ale przez tego maila
